summary: Merged architect + backend-dev + frontend-dev outputs into a full blueprint: problem/personas, MVP scope, data flow, ranked risks, 12-week roadmap, stack picks (Next.js + Supabase + graphile-worker + Anthropic), HIPAA posture (BAA map, PHI encryption via pgcrypto, audit log), API surface, data model, cost math, 6 clinician screens, UX patterns and accessibility. Includes Open Questions for Adil (BAA choice, pilot clinic, jurisdiction) and Provenance.
